name: Vidalia Onion and Apple Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 large Vidalia onions, sliced into 1/8 inch slices
3 medium apples, peeled and sliced into 1/8 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the onion, apple, and bacon slices in a 2-quart casserole.
2. Pour the chicken broth into the bottom of the casserole.
3. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
4. While baking, sauté bread crumbs in 2 tablespoons of bacon fat.
5. Uncover the casserole and dot with bread crumbs.
6. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Serves 4.
